title: B4/B8 R165 complete-candidate selection replay protocol

candidate_event_schema.yielded_candidate: every complete mapping yielded by the VF2 iterator, with candidate_index, mapping labels, source score bits, source leaf bits, and enumeration order
candidate_event_schema.returned_candidate: the final mapping and score returned by minimize_vf2_with_score; retained separately for source replay validation
candidate_event_schema.candidate_set_boundary: only candidates yielded by the frozen source iterator are replayed; alternate search traversal is not claimed

selection_rule.replace: replace incumbent when the policy comparison is Less
selection_rule.source_f64: left-to-right binary64 sum of retained score leaves
selection_rule.compensated_fsum: math.fsum over retained binary64 score leaves
selection_rule.exact_binary64_leaf: exact rational sum of retained binary64 leaves, compared exactly
selection_rule.tie_aware_1ulp: exact comparison returns Equal when the exact gap is at most one ULP of the larger-magnitude source candidate score; otherwise use exact comparison

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: candidate-level replay of the frozen VF2 iterator output under four declared arithmetic selection policies, with source-return validation
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: an alternate search path, a production remedy, a confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform determinism, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit

requirements.label: source commit, input, patch, patched source, binary, and build manifest are hash-bound
candidate and score-trace APIs pass pre-registration smoke
native, ascending, and descending profiles are frozen
three processes and 256 post-registration calls are fixed
every complete yielded candidate retains mapping, score, leaves, index, and row hash
first-seen incumbent and four arithmetic policy rules are fixed before execution
source-return validation is required before interpreting any policy difference
no simulation, shots, route change, sampling, hidden seed, or hardware claim is allowed
candidate-enumeration boundary is disclosed and alternate search is not claimed
forbidden bug, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false
